page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and utilizing KVM virtualization, this server provides 256 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. The instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs, relying entirely on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

In benchmark testing, the instance demonstrates strong single-core CPU performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 3072.68 placing it in the top 25 percent of tested servers. Multi-core CPU performance is average, scoring 49143.43. Memory bandwidth tests show average speeds, with read-only large block bandwidth at 75.61 GB/sec and write large block bandwidth at 56.11 GB/sec. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performs strongly at 174.65 GB/sec, while single-threaded compression and decompression tasks fall into the average tier.

Given its high memory density of 8 GB per core and dedicated CPU allocation, the ecs.r8a.8xlarge offers a cost-efficient profile for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The absence of bundled local storage represents a tradeoff, requiring network storage configuration. This instance is well-suited for memory-intensive applications, database caching layers, enterprise applications, and multi-threaded data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8a.8xlarge is a memory-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T24 processor at 2.7 GHz and 256 GB of RAM. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under KVM virtualization, this instance provides a high 8 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPUs, relying on network-attached storage and a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks show strong single-core CPU capabilities and strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth results. This configuration is designed for memory-intensive workloads, enterprise applications, and database caching.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and high memory density for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T24 vCPUs running at 2.7 GHz
256 GB of system memory providing 8 GB per core
Strong single-core CPU and multi-threaded decompression performance
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and enterprise applications
